WebLink.url: https://www.dreamfactory.net/sforce/gameplan/gameplan.html? sforce_session_id={!API.Session_ID}& sforce_server_url={!API.Partner_Server_URL_120}& sforce_user_name={!User.Username}& sforce_full_name={!User.Name}& sforce_user_id={!User.Id}& custom_link_flags=Requirements%20Map& custom_link_id={!Opportunity.Id}
